## Summary

What does this PR do, in 1-2 sentences?

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? Link any related issue: `Closes #NNN`.

## Changes

- Bullet list of the main technical changes

## How I tested

- [ ] Built locally with `make build`
- [ ] Ran the test suite with `⌘U` in Xcode (or `xcodebuild test -scheme Meridian`)
- [ ] Exercised the feature manually in the menu bar / popover
- [ ] Verified no regression on the affected area

## Screenshots / recordings

If this touches the UI, drop a before/after or a short recording here.

## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages follow the convention described in [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] I have not introduced any force-unwraps or force-tries
